claim: YOLO demand router schema readiness blocks PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify recommendation, block recommendation, failed status, scope violations, or project locator violations.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() function checks evidence agent results and creates blockers for missing agents, missing data, clarify/block recommendations, and evidence scope violations.
evidence.why: This is the core PRD readiness gate that transforms evidence agent issues into readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: Lines 709-733 iterate through required evidence agent roles and call evidenceResultBlockingIssues(), evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues(), and projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() to generate blockers.
evidence.why: This loop is where evidence agent results are converted to PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues() function creates blockers when agents report missing data, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, or failed status.
evidence.why: This function implements the blocking logic for missing, clarify, and block recommendations.

evidence.summary: Lines 496-502 push EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when agent result missing array contains actionable items.
evidence.why: Direct implementation of missing evidence blocking.

evidence.summary: Lines 503-509 push EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker based on agent recommendation or verdict.
evidence.why: Direct implementation of clarify and block recommendation blocking.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() function returns EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidence records lack valid scope declaration.
projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() returns PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE or PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker when project-scoped facts lack project evidence or concrete path.
evidence.why: Implementation of project locator validation blocking.

evidence.summary: Lines 744-757 show that prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness.
evidence.why: Final gate that prevents prd_ready=true when any blockers exist.

evidence.summary: Test evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness verifies EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers.
evidence.why: Test coverage proving missing/clarify recommendations block readiness.

evidence.summary: Test cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result verifies missing explorer, cross-checker, and verifier blockers.
evidence.why: Test coverage proving missing required agents block readiness.

evidence.summary: Test evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly verifies EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker prevents prd_ready.
evidence.why: Test coverage proving scope violations block readiness.

evidence.summary: Test project evidence requires a concrete project locator verifies PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker prevents prd_ready.
evidence.why: Test coverage proving project locator violations block readiness.

evidence.summary: Lines 574-617 in runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() re-check PRD readiness after agent execution and add boundary violation blockers if agents modified project files.
evidence.why: Implementation showing evidence dispatch re-validates readiness and adds boundary blockers.

evidence.summary: Lines 44-70 document that demand router hard triggers require cross-check evidence and any blocker, unconfirmed assumption, or required evidence missing prevents prd_ready=true.
evidence.why: Product documentation confirming the evidence-based blocking contract.

evidence.summary: Line 56 states any blocker, unconfirmed assumption, or required evidence missing不得标记 prd_ready=true.
evidence.why: Direct documentation of the blocking policy.

risks: If evidence agents fail to report missing data in the missing array, blockers will not be generated
If evidence scope validation logic has bugs, invalid evidence could pass through
If boundary snapshot detection misses file changes, project mutations could go undetected

result.notes: Evidence confirms that YOLO demand router schema readiness correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, failed status, scope violations, or project locator violations. The implementation in router.ts converts all these conditions into blockers, and prd_ready is only true when blockers.length === 0.
